title: pelargonium orientum
intro: Pelargonium orientum, also known as Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, making it useful in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium orientum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds and flu.
